name: SET SOAR Tagger
description: This playbooks is intended to find all NIH SOAR indicators and set a 'SOAR' tag to identify them as such.

jobList.name: Assign new Tag to SOAR Indicators
SET SOAR Tag Failed: GET Indicators Failed

jobParameterList.value: SET SOAR Tag Failed: GET Indicators Failed

jobList.name: SET SOAR Tag Failed: Iterator Failed

jobParameterList.value: Failed to tag an indicator with 'SOAR'. Check Set SOAR Tagger playbook.
typeName in ("Address") and dateAdded >= "NOW() - 1 DAY" and NOT hasTag(summary in ("SOAR Indicator PB")) and ownerName in ("HTOC Org")
